\documentclass{siddur}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  The desert mishkan was a portable sanctuary. Its care was guarded by the Levites and \\
the priests yet it invited all to bring their offerings. Today, we are all caretakers of \\
Mishkan T'filah; may our offerings be acceptable before God. \\
May all who enter find joy, solace and meaning. \\
RABBI ELYSE D. FRISHMAN \\
Editor \\
RABBI PETER S. KNOBEL \\
Chair of the Editorial Committee%
}

\begin{document}
